source.submodule: Array of structure and nested structure

topicTags: Array of structure and nested structure

content.problemStatement:
You are an ardent movies fan.

We are given the following information about $T$ movies
- Name of the movie
- Year of its release
- Popularity on imdb (on a scale of 1 to 5 - necessarily integers)

You need to use your knowledge about an array of structures and output the following - 
- The year which had the most movies. We need to output the latest year in case there are multiple years with the same count of movies released.
- Count of movies with popularity greater than or equal to 4.

Check the sample input / output below for further clarity.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq N \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq A_i \leq 10^9$
- The sum of $N$ over all testcases does not exceed $2\cdot 10^3$
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $T$, denoting the number of movies.
- Information about each movie consists of 3 lines of input.
    - The first line contains the name of the movie
    - The second line contains the year of its release
    - The third line contains its imdb score
content.outputFormat:
- The year which had the most movies. We need to output the latest year in case there are multiple years with the same count of movies released.
- Count of movies with popularity greater than or equal to 4

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Note that each year has only 1 movie.
We need to output the latest year in case there are multiple years with the same count of movies released.
